title: Gift registry form tool

posts.author: ashleyct (Ashley Visagie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day

Is Monday.com forms able to replicate what the Jotform gift registry widget does?

Basically a multi-select field that has customisable limits set for how many times it can be chosen. This is useful for conference breakout planning, room limits, gift registries etc.

Here is a link to the widget on Jotform:

Jotform

Gift Registry - Form Widgets | Jotform

Let form users select items from your registry directly on your form. Whenever a form user purchases an item, this widget will automatically lower the amount of availability — so people won't be able to buy repeats of an item...

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
I do not believe it can because monday.com forms cannot display column values from items.

That said, there is a Jotform integration for monday.com - so your Jotform data can be sent to monday. It may also be possible to pull data from monday to jotform.
